mapper.insert: insert into nursing_plan(sort_no, plan_name, status, create_time, create_by, update_by, remark) values (#{sortNo}, #{planName}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update nursing_plan set sort_no = #{sortNo}, plan_name = #{planName}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select np.*, su.real_name from nursing_plan np left join sys_user su on np.create_by = su.id
and np.plan_name like concat('%',#{planName},'%')
and np.status = #{status}
order by np.sort_no
select np.*, su.real_name from nursing_plan np left join sys_user su on np.create_by = su.id where np.id = #{id}
